prerequisites: A Qonto business account (organization) with access to the Business API.
Permission to view the organization's API key in the Qonto web app, found under Settings > Integrations and Partnerships > API key.
The login and secret key that together form the api_key credential, plus the API endpoint base URL (for example https://thirdparty.qonto.com).
The IBAN of the Qonto bank account whose data you want to sync.

authMethods.name: API key (login and secret key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single secret field api_key. Qonto's Business API performs authentication via the HTTP Authorization header, formatted as the organization login and secret key joined by a colon (login:secret-key), with no Base64 encoding. Retrieve both values from the Qonto web app under Settings > Integrations and Partnerships > API key, and supply them as the api_key config value.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API login and secret key
setupSteps.body: In the Qonto web app, click the Settings icon, then go to Integrations and Partnerships > API key. Generate a secret key if you do not already have one. Note both the login and the secret key, which together form the api_key credential.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_key credential
setupSteps.body: Provide the required secret api_key field using your Qonto login and secret key. Qonto authenticates by sending these in the Authorization header as login:secret-key (no Base64 encoding).

setupSteps.title: Configure the endpoint
setupSteps.body: Set the required endpoint field to the Qonto Business API base URL you are targeting (for example, the production thirdparty.qonto.com host or the sandbox environment). You can confirm credentials work by calling /v2/organization, which returns 200 on success and 401 if the Authorization header is wrong.

setupSteps.title: Specify the account IBAN
setupSteps.body: Set the required iban field to the IBAN of the Qonto bank account you want the source to read from.

setupSteps.title: Set an optional start date
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_date to bound how far back data is synced. If omitted, the connector uses its default range.

sources.title: Where can I find my API login and secret key? - Qonto Help Center
